summary: Your autonomic recovery is strong today — Nightly Recharge hit 5/6 against a 3.7 weekly average, and HRV came in at 70 ms versus your 63 ms baseline, both pointing to a well-recovered nervous system. The one flag is sleep: 5.4 hours is nearly an hour under your 6.3-hour average, so you're recovered but underslept. Green-light a hard session today — your body is primed for it and the recharge score already absorbed the short night. Just front-load the intensity earlier rather than late, and treat tonight's sleep as non-negotiable to keep this trend from reversing. Aim for 7+ hours and protect a consistent wind-down so a single short night doesn't compound into a deficit.
